statement.p: When a heating oil tank is decommissioned, it is drained of its remaining oil and then filled with an inert material, such as sand. One cylindrical oil tank has a volume of {400\ {\rm gal}} and is being filled with sand at a rate of {600\ {\textstyle\frac{\rm\mathstrut gal}{\rm\mathstrut hr}}}\text{.} Write an equation where the solution is the amount of time, in hours, that it will take to fill the tank with sand. There is no need to solve the equation.
